svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1008px; height: 1px; padding-top: 19px; margin-left: 73px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Agent Taxonomy — Role Evolution Across the Maturity Curve

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 83px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #444444;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#444444, #b3b3b3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 1
THE ORACLE
Stateless — no memory
No tools · No autonomy
Human interprets all output

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 253px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 2
BOUNDED EXECUTOR
Session-persistent memory
Bounded toolkit
Human reviews all output

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 423px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 3
INTENT-AWARE EXECUTOR
Persistent + intent context
Can escalate value conflicts
Executes within org goals

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 593px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 4
AUTONOMOUS EXECUTOR
Persistent + spec-loaded
Full toolkit — spec-bound
Owns full workflow domain

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 763px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 5
HARNESS-MANAGED EXECUTOR
Harness-managed state
Harness-dispatched tools
Can be paused or re-routed

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 133px; margin-left: 933px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 6
ENVIRONMENT-NATIVE EXECUTOR
Environment-integrated state
Environment API contracts
Errors are environment signals

div.div: Capability is cumulative: a Stage 5 agent is also a bounded executor, intent-aware executor, and specification executor — all monitored and managed by the harness.

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
